Description: Summon forth Alsvid, a unicorn whose rainbow hair makes it the rarest of its kind─a veritable unicorn among unicorns.
DescriptionEnhanced: Legend holds that this unicorn, possessed of splendid rainbow hair, is destined to bear a soul who embodies the brilliance of the sun. In seeming confirmation of said legend, the creature spurns ordinary riders, and lends its back only to the Warrior of Light.
Tooltip:
Spying on you is as simple
as sliding down the back
of a rainbow.
   - Feo Ul

Description: Summon forth your Alexandrian axe beak, a reptilian bird favored of the merchant Rowena. Not to be confused with the beast native to Thanalan.
DescriptionEnhanced: Under the patronage of its mistress Rowena, this reptilian bird has led a pampered life. However, when a customer requested a specimen of the beast of the same name native to Thanalan, it was mistakenly transported all the way from Tural. The error did not come to light until it was too late, and the creature ended up in your care.
Tooltip:
How do you hope to survive with
even more beaks to feed?
   - Sanu Vanu

Description: Summon forth your shagcoat cat, a gigantic-yet-gentle feline with a penchant for sporting a blue bowtie.
Summon forth your shagcoat cat, a gigantic-yet-gentle feline with a penchant for sporting a blue bow tie.
Summon forth your inflatable mograft, a flotation device designed with both relaxation and safety in mind.
DescriptionEnhanced: Created for the Moonfire Faire, the inflatable mograft was originally a simple device for lounging on the water. When an incident occurred which saw riders swept out to sea, however, it was decided that the units would be fitted with wind crystals, that festival-goers may fly to safety in the event of an emergency.
Tooltip:
All kinds of things come
floating in on the waves.
   - Zukin

Description:
スターライトスレイに騎乗する。
星芒祭で作られた大型のソリ。トナカイ付き
DescriptionEnhanced: 星芒祭のため、グリダニアの有志が協力して作り上げた大型ソリ。飾り付けをはじめ、細部に子どもたちの一生懸命な仕事ぶりがうかがえる。ベルを鳴らせば気分は上々、星屑の煌めきが聖人の従者を祝福するだろう

Description: Manifest your wings of legacy, a spirit of legend said to favor the strong.
DescriptionEnhanced: Tonawawtan legend speaks of a spirit that favors the strong and bestows wings upon those it deems worthy. Having gifted you several arrays of wings, the being has seen fit to grace your shoulders itself in recognition of the unimaginable trials you have overcome.
Tooltip:
I have the makings of a new verse
that captures Tural's shining legacy!
   - The Wandering Minstrel

Description: Call into action your rocket punch. A ridable rocket that takes the form of a fist─or vice versa, depending on one's philosophy.
DescriptionEnhanced: This personal mode of transport assuming the form of a fist was created by Wedge of Garlond Ironworks, who went so far as to give it fully articulated fingers. While the reason for its unconventional design is unclear, it cannot be denied that it boasts a certain awe factor.
Tooltip:
I'll warm up when I
throw a punch or two.
   - Lyse

Description: Manifest your wings of nihility. Their unsettling, tendriled form exudes the bottomless obsession of a voidsent sovereign.
DescriptionEnhanced: Found in the Unmaking, these unsettling wings are reminiscent of Enuo, the dread voidsent who had made their domain in the ocean's depths. While their origin is shrouded in mystery, only one whose inner light can repel all-consuming nothingness can hope to bear them.
Tooltip:
All shall return to nothingness!
   - Emperor Xande
